summary: Iteration 22: Complete testing of Organizer Hub Dashboard refonte. ALL FEATURES WORKING. Hub displays 9 rectangular buttons with colored icons. All sections navigate correctly with back button. Backend APIs tested (13/13 passed).
passed_tests: Organizer Hub: 9 hub buttons visible (Événements, Participants, Jauges, Check-in, Finances, Correspondances, Partage, Contact Admin, Résultats)
Organizer Hub: Stats bar shows 3 cards (19 Événements, 2 Participants, 70€ Revenus)
Organizer Hub: All hub buttons have colored icons (blue, green, orange, purple, pink, sky, red, amber)
Navigation: Back button (Home icon) returns to hub from every section
Événements section: 19 event cards displayed with images, dates, locations, fill percentages
Participants section: Table with Dossard, Participant, Événement, Course, Montant, Date, Statut columns
Participants section: Search bar and event filter dropdown working
Jauges section: Dark background with real-time fill rates per event
Jauges section: Shows race/wave breakdown with progress bars
Check-in section: QR icon search bar, participant table with bib numbers
Check-in section: T-shirt size column visible
Check-in section: 'RÉCUPÉRÉ' status shows green row (kit collected)
Check-in section: CSV export button working
Finances section: Revenue summary (Total revenus, Participants payés, Votre revenu net)
Finances section: Detail per event with download buttons
Finances section: CSV and PDF export buttons present
Correspondances section: 'Nouveau message' button opens compose form
Correspondances section: Event selector, Subject input, Message textarea present
Correspondances section: 'Envoyer aussi par email' checkbox present
Correspondances section: Send button present
Correspondances section: History of sent messages displayed
Partage section: Events listed with share links
Partage section: Facebook, Twitter, WhatsApp, Email share buttons for each event
Partage section: Copy link button working
Contact Admin section: MessagingPage component embedded
Contact Admin section: Conversations sidebar visible with existing conversations
Résultats section: Import CSV chronométrage option present
Résultats section: Event selector dropdown present
Résultats section: 19 events listed with 'Voir résultats' and 'Export' buttons
Create Event dialog: 'Nouvel événement' button in header opens multi-step wizard
Create Event dialog: Step 1 (Sport & Lieu) with title input, sport type grid, date/location fields
Backend API: GET /api/organizer/all-participants returns participants list (200 OK)
Backend API: GET /api/organizer/all-participants?event_id=X filters by event (200 OK)
Backend API: GET /api/organizer/correspondances returns sent messages (200 OK)
Backend API: POST /api/organizer/correspondances/send validates message required (400 for empty)
Backend API: POST /api/organizer/correspondances/send sends message to recipients (200 OK)
Backend API: POST /api/organizer/checkin/mark-collected validates registration_id required (400)
Backend API: POST /api/organizer/checkin/mark-collected returns 404 for invalid registration
Backend API: POST /api/organizer/checkin/mark-collected marks kit collected (200 OK)
Backend API: GET /api/organizer/events returns organizer's events (200 OK)
Backend API: Authentication required for all organizer endpoints (401 without token)
Backend API: Participant role blocked from organizer endpoints (403)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data (19 events, 2 participants)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22: Organizer Hub Dashboard fully tested. Hub uses activeSection state to navigate between sections. All 9 hub buttons work: events, participants, gauges, checkin, finances, correspondances, share, contact-admin, results. Back button (Home icon) in header returns to hub. MessagingPage embedded in contact-admin section. Create event dialog with multi-step wizard still works from header button.
